title: Cuori sul mare
writer: Siro Angeli, Oreste Biancoli, Golfiero Colonna
actors: Doris Dowling, Jacques Sernas, Milly Vitale
plot: Paolo Silvestri, grandson of a retired admiral, and Massimo Falchetti, son of a rich shipping magnate, are studying at Leghorn Academy. The two friends both love the sea, but whilst Paolo has the Navy in his blood, Massimo hates m...
